title: National digital infrastructure to measure the true cost of mental health
description: A national digital infrastructure that quantifies the economic and social value of mental health. It demonstrates how wellbeing correlates with productivity, educational attainment, and innovation. This initiative aims to position mental health as a strategic investment, not an expense.

title: National listening infrastructure
description: A continuous “deep listening” system collecting narratives from frontline workers, service users, and communities, combing diverse and interconnected listening channels. Data and narratives are analysed and shared with policymakers in real time to inform decision-making.

title: The living map of the mental health ecosystem in Ireland
description: An open-access, interactive national platform visualising where local mental health initiatives exist and how they influence broader systemic transformation — connecting actors, identifying leverage points, and encouraging collaboration. This platform can be integrated into the national listening infrastructure.
